name: Git 工具
description: dtool Git 操作工具：上传文件、查询/切换分支、拉取代码（远程 API），以及查看分支改动、单文件 diff、本地文件变更、前端/后端范围 diff（本地 git）。
tool_description: Git toolkit for dtool. Remote (via dtool API): upload local files to remote git project, query current branch, pull code, switch branch. Local: list changed files vs a base branch with status and line counts, show single-file diff (text/binary/image), local change summary, and frontend/backend scoped diffs. Select the operation via the `action` parameter.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: 操作类型：upload_file | current_branch | pull | change_branch | branch_diff | file_diff | file_changes | frontend_diff | backend_diff

parameters.name: git_id
parameters.description: 远程操作（upload_file/current_branch/pull/change_branch）所需的 git 仓库 ID

parameters.name: base_url
parameters.description: dtool 服务地址，默认 http://localhost:17170

parameters.name: base_branch
parameters.description: branch_diff/file_diff/frontend_diff/backend_diff 的对比基分支；file_diff 可用 _workspace_ 表示对比 HEAD 与工作区

parameters.name: local_dir
parameters.description: 本地 git 仓库目录，默认当前工作目录

parameters.name: parent_branch
parameters.description: file_changes 的对比基分支（可选）

parameters.name: with_diffs
parameters.description: file_changes 是否返回所有文件 diff

parameters.name: target_file
parameters.description: file_changes 单文件 diff 路径

parameters.name: extra_excludes
parameters.description: frontend_diff/backend_diff 额外排除的路径列表（可选）

parameters.name: local_file_paths
parameters.description: upload_file 要上传的文件列表（每项含 full_file_path 与 relative_file_path）
